name: Jewish Apple Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the apples and slice them thinly.
2. Mix the apple slices well with cinnamon and 7 tablespoons of sugar, ensuring the apples are fully covered.
3. Set aside the apple mixture.
4. In a separate bowl, mix together the other ingredients: baking powder, salt, flour, cooking oil, additional sugar, orange juice, and pecans.
5. Pour half of the batter into a well-greased tube pan.
6. Add half of the apple slices to the pan.
7. Pour the remaining batter over the apples.
8. Add the rest of the apple slices on top.
9. Bake for 1 hour and 45 minutes, checking after the first hour.
10. Allow to cool in the pan for 20 minutes before serving.
